name: Oven Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 2 Tablespoons vegetable oil or butter, melted
1 Cup Sleep-in Pancake Mix (see recipe), plus one tablespoon
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees F. With a wire whisk or fork, beat the buttermilk, egg, and oil until well blended. Add the pancake mix; beat until smooth. Alternatively, use a food processor fitted with the steel blade: Put all ingredients in a work bowl and pulse four or five times, just to combine ingredients. Do not overprocess.
2. Generously grease 2 baking sheets with butter. Place the sheets briefly in the preheated oven, ensuring the butter does not burn.
3. Remove the pans from the oven. Ladle batter onto the hot baking sheets. Bake until browned (9 to 12 minutes). The pancakes do not need to be turned.
